base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pause_inventory_grid_overworld — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 legend of zelda. Overworld pause menu — shows Triforce progress (how many of 8 dungeon fragments collected) + level-indicators. Pink-triangle triforce rendering. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Overworld pause menu — shows Triforce progress (how many of 8 dungeon fragments collected) + level-indicators. Pink-triangle triforce rendering
